name: Mint Chocolate Brownie Pie
recipeIngredient: 15 ounce package Pillsbury All-Ready Pie Crusts
15 ounce package Pillsbury Deluxe Fudge Brownie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust according to package directions for a filled one-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan. Refrigerate any remaining crust for later use.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Sprinkle mint chips over the bottom of the pie crust-lined pan.
4. In a medium bowl, combine brownie mix, water, egg, and melted chocolate; beat with a spoon until smooth (50 strokes).
5. Spread the batter evenly over the mint chips.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 35 to 42 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Serve warm with ice cream.
7. Makes 8 servings.
Per serving: 570 calories, 6 g protein, 77 g carbohydrate, 26 g fat, 50 mg cholesterol, 400 mg sodium
Pillsbury Classic Cookbook #86, p. 81, 33rd Bake-Off
Submitted by Constance Beckwith, North Franklin, CN
